encryption_at_rest: platform-managed keys (source); Unity Catalog managed storage (target)
network: source reachable over private endpoints; target on a private-link workspace
audit_logging: source SQL audit -> target Unity Catalog system.access.audit
row_level_security: source RLS on sales.dim_customer by region -> UC row filter
column_masking: source dynamic data masking on customer_name -> UC column mask
